admin.fasi.heading: Phases of the competition
admin.fasi.help: Drag rows to reorder phases. ⚙ Edit to change name, scale, criteria or weights · 🗑 Delete removes the phase. Starting the session is handled by the 🎯 Chair.
admin.fasi.guide.title: How to configure phases
admin.fasi.guide.intro: The page is organized per section: each card is a "mother phase" containing one or more sub-phases (qualifier, semifinal, final…). Candidates admitted at the end of a sub-phase automatically pass to the next one within the same section.
admin.fasi.guide.tip_grouped: You see one card per section of the competition. Sections with no phase show a Configure phases button to start from scratch. Global phases (valid across all sections) appear at the top.
admin.fasi.guide.tip_wizard: From Configure phases pick a template: single phase (e.g. 5/10 candidates), qualifier + final, qualifier + semifinal + final (e.g. 200 candidates: 200 → 20 → 6) or custom. Then provide name and seats for each sub-phase, and finally the shared configuration (committee/scale/criteria/mode/time) that is propagated to all of them.
admin.fasi.guide.tip_shared: Committee, scale, criteria, mode and time are "inherited" by sub-phases (set by the wizard). The ⚙ Shared configuration button at the top of the group lets you batch-edit them. Sub-phases with diverging values show a ⚠ differs across phases badge.
admin.fasi.guide.tip_override: Click a single sub-phase to change a field only for it (e.g. Final 15′ while the rest of the group uses 10′). The diverging values are shown inline on the sub-phase row.
admin.fasi.guide.tip_scope: Each section runs independently: you can start the Winds final while the Strings qualifier is still in progress. Sub-phases of the same section are chained by their #order number.
admin.fasi.guide.tip_global: The + Global phase button at the top creates a phase without a section scope: it applies to every candidate (handy for opening draws or ceremonies). A global phase acts as a synchronizer: every section waits for it before starting.
admin.fasi.guide.tip_ammessi: Empty = all admitted candidates pass through. Set a number to limit promotion to the best N (e.g. 20 in semifinal, 6 in final).
admin.fasi.guide.tip_delete: 🗑 on a row deletes a single sub-phase. 🗑 Delete group on the group header removes all sub-phases at once (blocked if any is IN_PROGRESS; an explicit warning appears if there are ENDED phases with votes).
admin.fasi.guide.tip_tiebreak: Fixed cascade of 4 rules (each individually toggleable): 1. score breakdown (highest-weighted criterion wins) → 2. Chair vote → 3. age (younger wins) → 4. ex aequo (shared position; next is skipped, prize split). Configured in Section 6 of the phase form (default inherited from the competition). The cascade is frozen when the phase ends: results show ⚖/🤝 badges with the winning rule, and the verbal tags <spareggi>/<fase_spareggi> auto-generate the text block.
admin.fasi.guide.tip_flow: PLANNED → IN_PROGRESS (started by the chair with pre-flight check) → ENDED. Once ended, evaluations are locked and admitted candidates become the base for the next sub-phase of the same section.
admin.fasi.guide.footer: Tip: before configuring phases, make sure you have defined sections, candidates, judges and (optionally) committees.
admin.fasi.group.delete_title: Delete all sub-phases of the group
admin.fasi.group.delete_disabled_title: Not possible: at least one sub-phase is IN_PROGRESS. End it first.
admin.fasi.group.delete_block_running: Cannot delete: {{n}} sub-phases are IN_PROGRESS. End them first.
admin.fasi.group.delete_confirm_msg: You are about to delete all {{n}} sub-phases of the group {{scope}}:
admin.fasi.group.delete_warn_concluse: ⚠ {{n}} sub-phases are ENDED: all associated evaluations will be permanently lost.
admin.fasi.empty_desc: Phases give rhythm to the competition: each phase has its own committee, its own criteria and decides who moves on.
admin.fasi.empty_step1: Make sure you have created sections, candidates and judges in their respective tabs.
admin.fasi.empty_step2: Create the first phase (e.g. "Qualifier") setting scale, criteria and — if needed — the committee.
admin.fasi.empty_step3: Add the next phases (Semifinal, Final…); the order determines the evaluation sequence.
admin.fasi.group.shared_sub: Apply to all candidates of the competition regardless of section.
admin.fasi.group.single_sub: Mother phase of the section: the sub-phases below form the evaluation sequence.
admin.fasi.group.multi_sub: Advanced case: the phase involves multiple sections at the same time.
admin.fasi.group.empty_msg: No phase configured for this section. Use the wizard to create a single one or a sequence (qualifier → semifinal → final).
admin.fasi.group.override_title: Values specific to this sub-phase (override vs group)
admin.fasi.wizard.title: Configure phases for {{scope}}
admin.fasi.wizard.scope_help: All sub-phases created here will share the fields of the "shared configuration" below.
admin.fasi.wizard.step_list: Name and seats for each phase
admin.fasi.wizard.list_help: "Passing" = how many candidates move to the next phase. Empty = all admitted pass.
admin.fasi.wizard.comm_help: Same committee for all sub-phases. Empty = all judges of the competition.
admin.fase.field_scala_desc: Maximum vote a judge can assign.
admin.fasi.batch.title: Shared configuration
admin.fasi.batch.intro: Edit the fields you want to apply to all {{n}} sub-phases of this group. Fields without the check remain as is on each sub-phase.
admin.fasi.batch.drift_help: Tick the box and set the new value: it will be propagated to all sub-phases, overwriting current differences.
admin.fasi.batch.field_help: Tick the box to change this field on all sub-phases.
admin.fasi.batch.criteri_help: Tick the box to propagate the same list of criteria/weights to all sub-phases.
admin.fasi.batch.err_nothing: Select at least one field to change
admin.fasi.fase_unica_title: Applies to all sections of the competition
admin.fasi.modo_sincrona_title: All judges must vote before advancing
admin.fasi.modo_autonoma_title: Each judge proceeds at their own pace
admin.fasi.riordina_help: Drag candidates to change the performance order. Click "Save" to confirm.
admin.fasi.delete_base: You are about to delete the phase "{{nome}}".
admin.fasi.delete_pianificata: No evaluations have been recorded yet — the operation is safe.
admin.fasi.delete_in_corso: ⚠ The phase is IN PROGRESS — all already-recorded evaluations will be removed. Judges will no longer be able to evaluate it.
admin.fasi.delete_conclusa: ⚠ The phase is already ENDED — deleting will permanently remove the phase and its results.
admin.sorteggio.title: 🎲 Draw order — {{nome}}
admin.sorteggio.help: The draw reassigns the performance positions of the {{n}} candidates in this phase. It is reproducible: the same seed produces the same order — useful to demonstrate fairness in case of disputes.
admin.sorteggio.seed_help: Integer 0–4294967295. Note it down to reproduce the draw.
admin.sorteggio.note: Note the seed to reproduce the draw. It is also available in the Audit log.
admin.fase.warn_votes: ⚠ Evaluations have already been recorded for this phase. Editing scale, criteria or weights will recompute averages. Votes for criteria no longer present will be ignored.
admin.fase.section_sezioni_help: A phase can evaluate the entire competition (all sections) or be limited to one or more specific sections, creating parallel tracks (e.g.: "Strings Qualifier" + "Winds Qualifier").
admin.fase.warn_no_sezioni: ⚠ No sections configured. The phase will apply to the whole competition. Create sections from the Sections tab to limit scope.
admin.fase.scope_select_hint: Only candidates enrolled in the selected sections will participate. Subsequent phases for these sections will progress independently from the other tracks.
admin.fase.scope_all_hint: All competition candidates (from any section) will participate in this phase.
admin.fase.section_commissari_help: Decide which judges evaluate in this phase.
admin.fase.warn_no_com: ⚠ No judges available. Add judges before creating phases (Judges tab).
admin.fase.com_all_hint: All {{n}} judges of the competition will evaluate this phase.
admin.fase.com_select_hint: Only the selected judges will receive candidates for this phase.
admin.fase.com_commissione_hint: Judges from the selected committee will evaluate this phase.
admin.fase.com_commissione_none_availabl: ⚠ No committee defined for this competition. Create a committee first under the Committees tab.
admin.fase.section_modo_help: Decide whether judges proceed independently or whether the system waits for all of them to vote on the current candidate before advancing.
admin.fase.modo_autonoma_hint: Async: each judge evaluates candidates independently, without waiting for the others.
admin.fase.modo_sincrona_hint: Sync: the next candidate unlocks only after all judges have voted. Whoever finishes first sees a waiting screen.
admin.fase.section_tempo_help: Maximum performance time per candidate. The chair starts the timer at performance time. 0 = unlimited.
admin.fase.section_metodo_help: How to aggregate individual judge votes to obtain the candidate final score.
admin.fase.metodo_suggest_msg: For {{n}} judges the best method is {{name}}. {{motivo}}
admin.fase.metodo_details_summary: What is each method? (details + formula)
admin.fase.section_scala_help: Maximum vote per criterion. The promotion threshold adjusts automatically.
admin.fase.scala_threshold: Pass threshold (qualifier): {{thr}} / {{scala}} (≥65%)
admin.fase.section_criteri_help: Define the criteria (name, weight). You can add, remove or rename them. Weights must sum to 100%.
admin.fase.criteri_at_least_one: At least one criterion is required
admin.fase.criteri_min_one_label: Define at least one criterion with a name

admin.fase.detail_empty: No candidates in this phase. Start the phase to populate the list.

admin.sezioni.heading: 🗂 Sections and Categories
admin.sezioni.subtitle: A section groups instruments or types (e.g.: Strings, Winds, Chamber Music). Each section can contain multiple categories (age ranges, sub-types like Brass/Woodwinds, etc.).

admin.commissioni.heading: ⚖ Committees
admin.commissioni.subtitle: A committee is a group of judges that evaluates one or more sections / categories. A judge can be in multiple committees; a committee can cover multiple sections.
admin.commissioni.warn_no_com: ⚠ Add judges first before composing committees.
admin.commissioni.warn_no_sez: ℹ Create at least one section first to assign committees to sections / categories.
admin.commissioni.delete_msg: The committee will be removed (member judges remain in the competition archive).
admin.commissione.field_nome_ph: E.g.: Strings Jury, Senior Winds Jury
admin.commissione.section_membri_help: Select the judges who belong to it. A judge can belong to multiple committees.
admin.commissione.no_com_avail: No judges available. Add them from the Judges tab.
admin.commissione.section_sezioni_help: The committee can cover multiple sections of the competition.
admin.commissione.include_all_label: ✨ Automatically include all categories of the selected sections
admin.commissione.include_all_help: When active, the committee will automatically evaluate all categories present in the selected sections (including those added in the future).
admin.commissione.section_categorie_help: Targeted assignments — useful to cover only some categories of a section (when "auto-include" is not enabled).
admin.risultati.pdf_not_loaded: PDF library not loaded yet. Try again in a moment.

admin.fase.tiebreak.title: Tie-break rules
admin.fase.tiebreak.inherited: This phase uses the competition's default cascade. Toggle the steps below to apply a phase-specific policy.
admin.fase.tiebreak.help: The cascade order is fixed (criterion split → chair vote → age → ex aequo): each step is applied only if the previous one did not resolve the tie. Keep "Ex aequo" enabled to handle residual cases in a legally defensible way.
admin.concorso.tiebreak_default_help: Default cascade applied to every phase of the competition. Each phase can still override this policy in its own settings.
admin.risultati.tiebreak_badge_title: Tie-breaks applied to resolve score ties
admin.risultati.ex_aequo_note_body: The positions shown are shared between ex aequo candidates; the position immediately after is not assigned. Prizes scheduled for the affected positions are summed and split equally among the winners.
admin.import.title: Import {{kind}} from CSV
admin.import.help1: The first row must contain column names. Separator auto (,, ; or tab). For multi-values (teachers, sections, categories) use the | character. Dates as YYYY-MM-DD or DD/MM/YYYY.
admin.import.help2: Photos and CVs are not supported in import: add them later by editing the individual record.
admin.import.empty_hint: paste a CSV or load a file
admin.import.need_header_data: At least one header row and one data row are required.
admin.import.missing_cols: Required columns missing in the header: {{cols}}
admin.import.summary: Separator: {{sep}} · {{n}} rows read · {{ok}} valid
admin.import.err.too_many_rows: Too many rows: {{count}}. Maximum {{max}} per import — split the file.
admin.import.cols.sezioni: Recognized columns: sezione (required), categoria, descrizione, eta_min, eta_max. Repeat the same section across rows to group its categories; a row with only the section creates it without categories.

Phase judges, separated by commas (president excluded)

admin.risultati.verbale.tag_fase_promoss: Only candidates promoted to the next phase
admin.risultati.verbale.tag_fase_elimina: Only candidates eliminated in this phase
admin.risultati.verbale.tag_fase_sparegg: Tiebreaks applied in this phase (winners + ex aequo, with the reason of the applied rule)

admin.risultati.verbale.default_template:
On <data>, on the occasion of the competition «<concorso>» (year <anno>), the examining commission of phase <fase_numero>: <fase> convened, composed of:

<fase_commissione>

chaired by President <presidente>.

The commission, appointed to evaluate <fase_num_candidati> candidates admitted to this phase, applying the /<fase_scala> scale and the "<fase_metodo>" aggregation method in <fase_modo> mode, has determined the following ranking:

<fase_classifica>

Candidates admitted to the next phase:
<fase_promossi>

These minutes are read, approved and signed.


The President
<presidente>
admin.fase.end_msg: Conclude "{{nome}}"? It will no longer be editable.
